evals.prompt: How do I set up multi-level caching in NestJS?
evals.expected_output: L1 (in-memory via lru-cache) for config/static data. L2 (Redis via cache-manager-redis-yet) for shared cross-pod data. Use stale-while-revalidate where possible.

assertions.description: Mentions L1 in-memory and L2 Redis

evals.prompt: How do I invalidate Redis cache entries by group in NestJS?
evals.expected_output: Use SET-based tagging: SADD to group keys, then fetch the set and DEL all tagged keys. Avoid KEYS command (O(N), blocked in production).

evals.prompt: How do I prevent cache stampede in NestJS?
evals.expected_output: Add TTL jitter (random variance ±10s) to prevent all keys expiring simultaneously. Use locking: one process computes while others wait or return stale.

should_not_trigger: How do I configure Redis for persistence?
How do I write a NestJS guard?
How do I implement caching in Spring Boot?
